q1_restart_time.log_evidence: Last 'sports_bot_v2 starting' in bot_baseball_20260410.log is at 2026-04-10T18:52:24. No explicit startup log at 19:40:43Z found.
q1_restart_time.conclusion: Restart time claimed by manager (19:40:43Z) is NOT confirmed by log. Last logged restart is 18:52:24Z, ~48 minutes earlier.
q1_restart_time.critical: If restart was truly at 19:40:43Z, there should be a startup log line. Absence suggests either: (a) restart happened without logging, (b) restart time is incorrect, or (c) different process.

q2_trade_timestamps.verdict: CONFIRMED - Both trades opened AFTER claimed restart
q2_trade_timestamps.both_below_threshold: YES - both 0.33 and 0.39 are below gate threshold of 0.60/0.65

evidence: Line 632: check_entry_gates() called in bridge loop

q3_bridge_calls_check_entry_gates.code_flow: bot_core.py bridge section does call check_entry_gates() before opening trades
q3_bridge_calls_check_entry_gates.but_caveat: Code calls the gate, but runtime did not enforce it for trades 223/224

q6_root_cause.most_likely: STALE PROCESS - Process never restarted after 18:52:24, so it did not load the updated .env or risk.py changes
evidence: Manager claims restart at: 19:40:43Z (no log confirmation)
check_entry_gates logs appear until 19:37:16Z, then completely stop
Trades 223/224 open at 22:44/22:47 with zero gate rejection logs
.env shows MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE=0.65, but pre-19:40 logs show threshold 0.600 (the default)
If process had restarted and loaded .env after 19:40, logs should show 0.650 threshold post-restart, not disappear entirely

hypothesis_evaluation.a_bridge_bypasses_gate: UNLIKELY - Code shows gate call at line 632
hypothesis_evaluation.b_confidence_stored_differs: UNLIKELY - DB shows same confidence values as in logs
hypothesis_evaluation.c_stale_process: MOST LIKELY - Process appears to have run from 18:52:24 through 22:47:37 without restart, loading trades from model_bridge without proper gate enforcement
hypothesis_evaluation.d_restart_mismatch: POSSIBLE - Manager's claimed restart (19:40:43) has no log evidence; actual last restart is 18:52:24
hypothesis_evaluation.e_gate_disabled: .env shows 0.65, risk.py has gate code; gate not disabled
hypothesis_evaluation.f_other: Process may be running old bytecode from before MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE gate was added, or gate enforcement was disabled in a separate change

q6_root_cause.final_assessment: The confidence gate code EXISTS in source and IS being called (evidenced by lines 604,622,632,645), but runtime enforcement is NOT happening for trades 223/224. Most probable cause: process never restarted at claimed 19:40:43Z and continued running from 18:52:24Z without loading the updated gate code or .env values. The absence of check_entry_gates logs after 19:37:16 is the smoking gun.

critical_discrepancies: Claimed restart time (19:40:43Z) has zero log evidence
check_entry_gates logs present until 19:37:16, then completely absent until 22:44-22:47 trades open
.env shows 0.65 threshold, but pre-restart logs show 0.600 default (suggesting old process state)
Code structure shows gate is called, but runtime behavior shows it's not enforced
recommendation: BLOCKER - The runtime behavior does not match the code structure. Before declaring the gate working: (1) Verify that bot_core.py was actually loaded by the process with PID 24800 (check /proc/PID/exe or similar), (2) Kill any stale bot processes running from before 19:40:43, (3) Verify restart actually occurred and new code was loaded, (4) Check if there is a separate process or script opening these trades without gate checks
